blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Requires manual audio verification - cannot automate real microphone recording and transcription quality assessment in headless browser testing
Requires manual audio verification - cannot automate TTS audio playback quality assessment in headless browser testing

appliedUpdates.description: Documented Playwright microphone permission denial is irreversible in browser context. Testing VAL-VOICE-006 via localStorage state manipulation works as alternative. VAL-VOICE-003 and VAL-VOICE-004 require manual audio testing.
Documented STT server model loads lazily on first request, TTS server runs as system service. All voice services now confirmed operational via health checks.
